form.formComment: Third-up today. Freshened for 42 days. Resuming 3rd of 8 at Esperance Cl2 on February 20 over 1100m, 4 len behind Buster's Girl carrying 60kg at $6.50. Second-up ran last of 12 at Esperance Prov Series on March 1 over 1100m, 10 len behind Meat Pie Artie with 56kg at $41. Has ability and can break through on his best form.

form.formComment: Last start 4th of 9 at this track Cl2 on April 3 over 1300m, 1.75 len behind Gibraltar Gold carrying 59.5kg at $19. Before that got back early 7th of 10 at Esperance Cl2 on March 1 over 1200m, 4 len behind Favaios carrying 57.5kg at $3. Not far away here last time and can make his presence felt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin losing 1L. Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign fifth of 9 at York November 9 over 1500m, 2.75 len behind Rivercrest Magic with 57.5kg at $3.20. First up last campaign ninth of 11 at this track Cl2 September 21 over 1300m, 6 len behind Penned carrying 58.5kg at $4.80. Can put her best foot forward on resumption.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for a short distance on straightening.
Raced keenly through the early stages.
Began awkwardly, shifted in and made contact with Djapana.
Began awkwardly, shifted out and made contact with Atomic Clock.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start ran on from midfield; 2nd of 10 at this track Cl2 on April 3 over 1100m, 3 len behind Chipilly with 56kg at $11. The start before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 10 at Esperance Cl2 on March 1 over 1200m, long-neck behind Favaios carrying 57.5kg at $18. Nice draw and worth thought.

form.formComment: Comes off a 51 day let-up. Most recently raced on the speed throughout before fading second last of 8 at Esperance Cl2 on February 20 over 1100m, 9 len behind Buster's Girl carrying 57kg at $51. The run before that won by a nose at Esperance Mdn February 13 over 1100m defeating I Had A Dream carrying 56kg at $6. Prepared to work around.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Veered outwards on jumping. Lay outwards in the straight.
Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run favourite; won by 1.2 len at this track Mdn April 3 over 1100m defeating Spangledstar carrying 55.5kg at $1.80. Before that rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd of 12 at Belmont Park 3yo Mdn on February 25 over 1000m, 1.0 len behind Slip The Jab carrying 55kg at $2.70. Too good last time out and she can go on with the job now.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 49 days. First-up sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 10 at Belmont Park Cl1 on February 11 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Excess Baggage carrying 56kg at $8. Second run from a spell 5th of 10 at Pinjarra Scarpside Cl3 F&M on February 22 over 1400m, 4 len behind Elegant Indi with 55.5kg at $8. Has shown enough early in her campaign to suggest a win isn't far away.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months second last of 9 at this track Cl2 on April 3 over 1300m, 6 len behind Gibraltar Gold carrying 54.5kg at $20. Previously second-up ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 12 at Tamworth Cl2 on September 30 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Crimson Bonnet carrying 55.5kg at $26. Will need this run.
